title: KonoSuba: God's Blessing on This Wonderful World!
altTitles: Kono Subarashii Sekai ni Shukufuku wo!
description:
After dying in a ridiculous accident, Kazuma Satou is given the chance to be reincarnated in a fantasy world by the goddess Aqua. Before leaving, he is allowed to bring one thing with him, and out of spite, he chooses Aqua herself. Hoping for an exciting adventure filled with magic and heroism, Kazuma instead finds himself struggling to survive alongside an extremely dysfunctional group of companions.

Together with the useless goddess Aqua, explosion-obsessed mage Megumin, and masochistic knight Darkness, Kazuma takes on quests, battles monsters, and constantly gets dragged into absurd situations that rarely go according to plan. Despite their terrible luck and endless chaos, the group slowly forms strong bonds while causing trouble everywhere they go. Combining fantasy adventure, parody, hilarious comedy, and unforgettable characters, KonoSuba delivers a fun and chaotic take on the isekai genre.
